channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. Strikes Iranian Military Sites, and Trump's $1.8 Billion Fund Faces Scrutiny
item.description: American aircraft attacked several Iranian sites over the weekend, including Qeeshm Island. Meanwhile, Trump's anti-weaponization fund is under review.

item.title: AI Giant Anthropic Prepares to Sell Stock to the Public; Files Preliminary IPO Paperwork
item.description: The Anthropic IPO, along with those of other AI firms like OpenAI, could be among the largest in U.S. history.

item.title: Personalized cancer vaccine shows promise against melanoma using mRNA technology
item.description: A study indicates an mRNA vaccine combined with Keytruda significantly reduces melanoma recurrence risk.

item.title: Serena Williams announces return to professional tennis at age 44
item.description: Tennis legend Serena Williams plans to compete in the HSBC Championships in London this month.
